title: grouped quantiles with all null group causes following groups to return null
poc: create table x (i int, j int);
select quantile(i,0.5),j from x group by j;
key_bug_features: grouped quantiles with all null groups return null
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value FLOAT, category VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, category) VALUES (1, NULL, 'A'), (2, NULL, 'A'), (3, 10.0, 'B'), (4, NULL, 'B');
CREATE TABLE additional_data (group_id INT, group_value INT);
INSERT INTO additional_data (group_id, group_value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, NULL);
SELECT quantile(value, 0.5), category FROM test_data GROUP BY category;
